title: Merch birthday of Rei Ayanami question
display_title: Merch birthday of Rei Ayanami question
wikitext:
[]: [Merch] birthday of Rei Ayanami question             Quote Post by JC Denton » Thu Mar 06, 2014 11:01 am bought the cd from America (Japanese version of course), and it doesn´t have a back inlay. I´ve seen an ebay listing with no back inlay and a blue obi, while mine is black. thirdly I know that a version with back inlay indeed exists! so have I been ripped off? I even opened it to check it exactly, so it´s been a waste of a buy anyway catalogue number of mine is KICA 537...

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Thu Mar 06, 2014 10:23 pm My copy too lacks a back inlay and the obi, which I am surprised that I still kept, is black. I know I got this through a store or something. http://vgmdb.net/album/30421
